findings.description: The legend defining what ◎, ○, and × mean is absent from the knowledge file. The source explicitly states `[◎ 必須属性 ○ 任意属性 × 無効(指定しても効果なし)]` before the attribute table. Without this, an AI cannot definitively interpret whether ◎ means required, ○ means optional, or × means the attribute has no effect regardless of value — all of which are decision-critical when implementing with this widget.
findings.source_evidence: **属性値一覧**  [**◎** 必須属性 **○** 任意属性 **×** 無効(指定しても効果なし)]

findings.location: s1 (コードサンプル) — hints array
findings.description: The hint `n:param` is missing from s1. The server-side code example prominently uses `<n:param paramName="..." name="...">` inside `column:link`, making it a relevant keyword for queries about passing parameters with link columns.
